---
title: "线性纵向建模笔记"
subtitle: "HPD 685 — Linear Longitudinal Modeling"
author: ""
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY年MM月DD日"
lang: zh
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-title: "目录"
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    highlight-style: github
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    mainfont: "Noto Serif SC, serif"
    monofont: "Fira Code, monospace"
    css: styles.css
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include Longi.md >}}
